checkpoints.abortReason: No live migration without explicit human authorisation — operator declined or did not respond; aborting DAG
checkpoints.reviewPrompt: A live production migration of PII data is pending execution. Review the migration-execution script above. Authorise only if: (1) you have verified the rollback script is present, (2) the write-freeze and transaction wrapper are in place, (3) a backup < 1 hour old is confirmed. APPROVE to proceed or DECLINE to abort.
